steps.title: Find the target total
steps.content: $\frac{2}{5}$ of 700 flowers = $\frac{2}{5} \cdot 700 = 280$ flowers. We need a pair that sums to exactly 280.

steps.title: Read bar graph values and eliminate choices
steps.content:
From the bar graph: Daisy = 60, Orchid = 100, Tulip = 190, Lily = 180, Sunflower = 170.

  • Choice A — Daisy and orchid: $60 + 100 = 160 eq 280$. ✗
  • Choice B — Orchid and lily: $100 + 180 = 280$. ✓
  • Choice C — Orchid and sunflower: $100 + 170 = 270 eq 280$. ✗
  • Choice D — Lily and sunflower: $180 + 170 = 350 eq 280$. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
